name: Pearson Matrix
description: Computes a Pearson correlation matrix between the selected traces.
author: Daniel Zanelli

parameters.name: input_csv
parameters.label: Input CSV
parameters.description: CSV file with the fluorescence traces

parameters.name: correlation_threshold
parameters.label: Correlation threshold
parameters.description: Minimum Pearson correlation value to consider two cells as correlated

parameters.name: notes
parameters.label: Notes / remarks
parameters.description: Free text to record observations about this analysis

outputs.matrix_csv: Path to the CSV with the correlation matrix
outputs.heatmap_png: Path to the correlation heatmap image
